message:
fix(codegen): Handle large float floor/ceil and improve error propagation

- Fix OverflowError when calling __floor__/__ceil__ on large floats like 1.23e167
  by returning IntResult instead of extracting i64
- Add IntResult comparison support in assertEqual for IntResult vs float/int
- Fix assertRaises error propagation for time.sleep() with invalid args
- Handle float subclasses with __base_value__ in PyValue.from()
